scripts.dev:plugin: npm run plugin:link && concurrently -n plugin,astro -c cyan,magenta "npm run plugin:watch" "npm run dev"
scripts.plugin:link: cd "${PLUGIN_REPO:-../sanity-plugin-ab-testing}" && npm run build >/dev/null && cd - >/dev/null && PLUGIN_ABS="$(cd "${PLUGIN_REPO:-../sanity-plugin-ab-testing}" && pwd)" && rm -rf node_modules/sanity-plugin-ab-testing && ln -sfn "$PLUGIN_ABS" node_modules/sanity-plugin-ab-testing && echo "[plugin] linked → $PLUGIN_ABS"
scripts.plugin:unlink: npx --yes yalc retreat --all >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; rm -rf .yalc yalc.lock node_modules/sanity-plugin-ab-testing && npm i && echo '[plugin] restored to registry version'
scripts.plugin:status: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p='node_modules/sanity-plugin-ab-testing';try{const s=fs.lstatSync(p);if(s.isSymbolicLink()){console.log('mode: LOCAL  → '+fs.readlinkSync(p))}else{console.log('mode: REMOTE ('+require('./package.json').dependencies['sanity-plugin-ab-testing']+')')}}catch(e){console.log('not installed — run: npm i')}"
